---
permalink: /llms-full.txt
sitemap: false
---
# {{ site.title }} — full content

> Full text of every published post, concatenated for LLM ingestion. Curated index: {{ '/llms.txt' | absolute_url }}.

{% assign _posts = site.posts | sort: 'date' | reverse -%}
{% for post in _posts %}
# {{ post.title }}
{{ post.url | absolute_url }}{% if post.description %}
{{ post.description | strip_newlines }}{% endif %}

{{ post.content | markdownify | strip_html | strip }}

---
{% endfor %}
